name: io.github.helixdata/gopherhole
title: GopherHole Agent Hub
description: Standards-based A2A hub. One MCP connection to thousands of agents, with shared persistent memory.

environmentVariables.name: GOPHERHOLE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your GopherHole API key (starts with gph_). Auto-provisioned via browser login on first run if not set.

environmentVariables.name: GOPHERHOLE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the GopherHole hub URL. Defaults to https://hub.gopherhole.ai.
